title.en: Ye Tian Lion opened his mouth and said.

content.en:
"A bloodbath!"

Ye Tian Lion opened his mouth and said.

"Impossible!" Hitomi Ancestor immediately refused.

A robbery of blood, how is this possible!

The value of these members does not necessarily have a precious blood robbery, the strongest are just the strongest, and they can be cultivated with time, unless it is the junior who he fancies, he will be willing to pay a blood robbery value, otherwise these supreme strong people are not worth a blood robbery at all.

After all, the blood robbery is too precious, and you need to kill a robbery beast to get a copy of the blood.

However, the robber beast is too powerful, even he only dares to attack the robber beast of one or two tribulations, once the robber beast reaches the level of three tribulations, even he is not an opponent, unless the leader makes a move.

Therefore, it was impossible for the Illusory Dream Realm to pay a price for the blood robbery of these supreme beings.

Ye Tian wouldn't really expect Pupil Ancestor to pay a price of blood robbery to ransom these supreme powers, just give it a try.

"I want a treasure that contains a lot of calamity, do you have such a treasure in the Illusory Dream Realm?" Ye Tian asked.

Tong Ancestor didn't want to pay attention to Ye Tian, but these powerhouses in the Illusory Dream Realm were in Ye Tian's hands, and he had no choice but to help Ye Tian, so he had to answer: "In addition to the treasure of blood robbery, there is also a kind of treasure - robbery stone, which is a resource that is occasionally born when a foreign world is destroyed. The robbery stone also contains terrifying robbery power, which meets your requirements. "

"Take a look!"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, I have a few robbery stones in my hands!"

Hitomi Ancestor took out a robbery stone from the stored treasure and threw it to Ye Tian.

The robbery stone presents six sides, black, containing an incomparably rich robbery power, ordinary ancestors are afraid that they will be affected by the robbery power contained in the robbery stone and even the body, the robbery power it contains is too terrifying.

He did not urge the Secret Technique of Transforming the Tribulation, nor did he mobilize the Eternal Talent Tribulation, but relied on his own strength to try to refine the Tribulation Stone, and found that it was difficult for him to refine the Tribulation Stone, but he would be invaded by the Tribulation Power of the Tribulation Stone, and this Tribulation Force was destroying the physical body.

In such a situation, there is no way to use the robbery stone.

"Hitomi Clan, there is no way for the strongest to use the robbery stone to refine the flesh body to survive the tribulation, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"It can be, but it requires a lot of precious aids and secret arts, but the speed will be much slower than the tribulation power at the time of the catastrophe, but the catastrophe only exists for a short time, but with the catastrophe stone, you can always refine the tribulation power, but it is just a waste of resources and time. In short, it is impossible to rob the blood for you, only the robbery stone can be given to you, as for whether you want it or not, that's your business!" Hitomi Ancestor said coldly.

"I'm going to rob stones, but the value of robbing stones is far less than blood, and you have to pay enough to ransom these strongest ones. In addition, I also need detailed information on the cultivation of the invincible. Ye Tian asked.

"You're too greedy!" Hitomi Ancestor snorted coldly, but he didn't refuse Ye Tian.

The two continued to negotiate and finally determined the number of robbed stones, and Hitomi Ancestor was also willing to give Ye Tian the invincible cultivation materials.

10,000 robbery stones, plus a spiritual practice document.

Hitomi Ancestor asked the Illusory Dream Realm to prepare for a while, and then handed over these two things to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian did not regret it, otherwise, if the Illusory Dream Realm did whatever it takes, the human race and the Dark Forbidden Domain would not be able to stop the revenge of the Illusory Dream Realm, and now it was enough to be able to extort so many good things from the hands of the Illusory Dream Realm.

When Ye Tian left this forbidden place in the Illusory Dream Realm, he saw that this forbidden place had been annihilated, and the second-order gate had disappeared.

It can be seen that the Illusory Dream Realm has also given up the Dark Forbidden Realm and does not want such a loss again.

The human race, the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian came back and began to browse through the cultivation materials of the Invincible from the Illusory Dream Realm.

The strongest are divided into three levels: one, two, three, and the strength improvement has a lot to do with the supreme ancestral technique, and above the third level, there is also the level of the physical tribulation realm or the soul tribulation realm, and then there is the invincible realm, and the strength division of the invincible is more complicated.

First of all, the weakest invincible is the invincible who has just broken through, and they still use the strongest ancestral skill, and there is no invincible ancestral skill.

After that, it is an invincible person who has mastered an invincible ancestral skill, and such an invincible person is naturally much stronger than the invincible person who has just broken through, and his strength will change drastically.

As for how to comprehend an invincible ancestral technique, Ye Tian didn't know it before, but now he knew.

This exotic ultimate ancestral technique is fused with that exotic ultimate ancestral technique, and the ultimate ancestral technique that combines the rules of two exotic regions is fused to become the strongest ancestral skill, which is the origin of the supreme ancestral skill, but the invincible ancestral skill is not fused, but the rules of the eternal heaven and earth are comprehended, and there is a very low chance of comprehending an invincible ancestral skill.

"Eternal Heaven and Earth?"

Ye Tian didn't know what such a place represented, but did the word eternal have anything to do with eternal talent?

The Illusory Dream Realm didn't reveal much of the situation, so he was a little confused, obviously the Illusory Dream Realm deliberately didn't reveal it.

Basically, these two levels of invincible people are called sixth-level invincibles and fifth-level invincibles, which belong to the bottom of the invincibles, but most of the invincibles are at these two levels.

A fourth-class invincible person can be called a fourth-class invincible person only if he has mastered at least three invincible ancestral skills, and has cultivated to a level far beyond the ordinary invincible.

A third-class invincible person needs to be invincible and complete, master a variety of invincible ancestral skills, and require an invincible person who is promoted from the six tribulations of the body or soul, so that an invincible person can be called a third-class invincible.

As for the second-class invincible, the requirements are even higher, if it is an invincible person who has been promoted from the physical robbery realm, then the physical body is required to feed the soul, so that the soul can also carry out the cultivation of the robbery realm, and cross the tribulation again and again, and reach the same level of tribulation, it is a second-class invincible.

As for the first-class invincible, that is, the physical tribulation realm and the soul tribulation realm are fused together to become the invincible of the eternal tribulation realm, this is the first-class invincible.

"Invincible Ancestor, six ranks, divided into more detailed and several levels than the strongest ancestor. According to this division, the Hitomi Ancestor is estimated to be only a sixth-rank invincible, and as for the leader of the Illusory Dream Realm, he may only be a sixth-rank invincible, but his cultivation is profound, infinitely close to a fifth-rank invincible. Ye Tian guessed.

Of course.

Ye Tian still has a lot of things that he doesn't understand, but he can continue to blackmail the other five super-name-level forces, and let the five super-name-level forces give them a certain amount of robbery stones and materials in the same way.

"Just do it, don't rush to cultivate first, continue to blackmail these super-level forces, they have obtained resources from the Dark Forbidden Domain again and again, and they should also take revenge back!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
